reviews.author: Richard Gantt
reviews.text:
We at Gantt Family Law have had an outstanding experience working with Attorney Assistant. Their team recruited Laisha to serve as our Intake Specialist, and she has truly exceeded our expectations.

Laisha is professional, warm, and exceptionally organized. She connects naturally with potential clients during what is often one of the most stressful times in their lives. Her ability to listen carefully, gather detailed information, and communicate clearly ensures that every prospective client feels heard and supported from the very first call. She represents our firm with confidence, compassion, and professionalism, which is invaluable in family law.

Beyond Laisha’s excellent work, the team at Attorney Assistant has been consistently responsive and proactive. They are always open to feedback, eager to improve processes, and intentional about training and accountability. They ensure their staff is properly prepared, supported, and aligned with our firm’s standards.

We highly recommend Attorney Assistant to any law firm looking for high-quality recruiting, intake support, and ongoing partnership.

reviews.author: Jamila Perez
reviews.text:
We’ve had an outstanding experience working with Attorney Assistant. From start to finish, their team has been professional, attentive, and incredibly efficient. They took the time to understand our law firm’s specific needs and culture, and they delivered exactly what they promised.

The candidate they placed with our firm has been a true asset—competent, dependable, and a seamless fit with our team. It’s clear that Attorney Assistant carefully vets and prepares their employees before placement, which makes all the difference in a fast-paced legal environment.

A special kudos to Andrew and Eli for helping make our jobs easier throughout the entire process. Their responsiveness, follow-through, and genuine commitment to supporting our firm have not gone unnoticed.

Beyond their professionalism, what stands out most is how they appear to treat their employees—with fairness, transparency, and honesty. That level of integrity shows in the quality of the professionals they provide.

We highly recommend Attorney Assistant to any firm seeking reliable, high-quality staffing solutions. They have exceeded our expectations, and we look forward to continuing our relationship with them.

---Jamila Perez
Office Manager, Legal Assistant
The Fair Law Firm, LLC

reviews.author: Taylor Shepherd
reviews.text:
Attorney Assist is truly in a league of its own. Andrew and Ellie have been on this roller coaster with us, and their support throughout the process has been incredible. Their customer service is stellar — responsive, thoughtful, and genuinely invested in our success.

Our first assistant wasn’t the right fit, and that’s okay. Andrew and Ellie stepped in, guided us through the transition, and made sure our next hire was an amazing addition to our team. The difference has been night and day.

What sets Attorney Assist apart is that this isn’t just a typical VA service. Our assistant is fully integrated into our workflow and feels like a true member of our team — not just someone answering phones.

If you’re considering hiring a virtual assistant and want real support every step of the way, Attorney Assist is the way to go.

reviews.author: Diana Costantino
reviews.text:
Attorney Assist is truly like no other. You won’t find another company that provides the tools, guidance, and confidence needed to successfully hire a virtual assistant. Working with Andrew and Ellie has been an amazing experience—they made the entire hiring process seamless and stress-free. I honestly wish I could spend more time with them because they were so amazing.

What really sets Attorney Assist apart is that this is not a typical virtual assistant service. Our new hire has become a true part of our team. Unlike other companies where a VA simply answers phones without being integrated into daily operations, our VA is fully incorporated into our office workflow. She is a true teammate and absolutely exceptional.

If you’re looking to bring on a virtual assistant who will genuinely become part of your team, look no further. Attorney Assist is the go-to.

reviews.author: David Stern
reviews.text: Working with Attorney Assistant has been an outstanding experience for our firm. They provided us with a legal assistant who is exceptionally skilled, knowledgeable, and motivated. Despite being half a world away, she feels like a seamless part of our in‑office team. Her professionalism, initiative, and positive attitude have made her a favorite among everyone here.
